top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin funding rate hits 2-week high: Is $70K next?
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s funding rate and orderbook setup signal investor optimism, but ETF outflows and macro red flags could limit BTC’s short-term upside.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump signs executive orders setting 2031 deadline for post-quantum migration
top_signals.summary: One order mandated that all federal high-value assets and systems transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography by the end of 2031.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
